metadata.scoringScale: 1-10 per rubric dimension; independent holistic ranking supplied
metadata.mobileSurface: Clean 375x812 top-viewport captures used for visible scoring; retained full-page attempts duplicated content during browser stitching.
metadata.renderingCaveat: Mermaid was not rendered by the local Markdown renderer; adjacent source/README evidence was scored and the enhancement received a compatibility deduction where relevant.

limitations: The browser backend duplicated document content during full-page mobile stitching; clean 375x812 top-viewport captures were used for visible mobile scoring.
Mermaid was treated as an optional enhancement because the local renderer did not execute Mermaid; surrounding Markdown and source evidence remained visible.
